description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The property features a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, a patio area, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the rear facade, offering expansive views and natural light to the interior living spaces. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and partially open to a rooftop terrace. The front yard is enclosed by a low wall, and the landscaping includes both manicured shrubs and flowering plants. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on open outdoor living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a backyard pool, and minimalist landscaping. The design emphasizes open spaces and clean lines.
description_view_0: This view highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and several trees, as well as the rear facade's large glass windows and sliding doors.
description_view_1: The front of the house is visible, showing the main entryway, front yard, and the pool area enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the full length of the house, the pool, and the arrangement of trees and landscaping along the property boundary.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side of the house, showing the upper terrace, side entry, and additional landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and a small overhang, framed by clean lines and modern landscaping.
